name: Cartesian Capital
description: South African asset management business based in Johannesburg offering a range of products and solutions focused on listed fixed income and equities.

[ Get in Touch ](https://cartesian.co.za/get-in-touch/)
The Science of Wealth, the Art of Prosperity.
Cartesian Wealth and Advisory
At Cartesian Wealth & Advisory, we don’t just manage wealth; we cultivate prosperity. Let’s embark on this mathematical adventure together.
![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/4b/Arrow-Text-4b95af00.png)
###  OUR STORY
Our name pays homage to René Descartes, the visionary philosopher and mathematician who famously declared, “I think, therefore I am.” Descartes’ legacy resonates through our firm, guiding our commitment to thoughtful problem-solving and pioneering insights. Our team of financial experts don’t settle for surface-level answers. We delve deep, analysing, questioning, collaborating and refining until we find the optimal path.
![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/4b/Arrow-Text-4b95af00.png)
###  OUR VALUES
**Integrity** : We uphold the highest standards of honesty and transparency in all our dealings, ensuring that your trust in us is well-placed.
**Personalised Service** : Each client is unique, and so is our approach. We take the time to understand your individual financial goals and craft tailored solutions to achieve them.
**Expertise** : Our team of skilled professionals is dedicated to staying ahead of the curve with in-depth market knowledge and innovative strategies.
![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/4b/Arrow-Text-4b95af00.png)
###  OUR APPROACH
At Cartesian Wealth & Advisory, we believe that wealth management is an art form—a delicate balance of precision and vision. Our team of seasoned specialists, each with a focused competency in the financial sector, collaborates to tailor bespoke, long-term solutions for our clients. We don’t settle for mass-market approaches; instead, we provide individual attention and personalized strategies that align with your unique goals.
* * *
![Cartesian WEALTH MANAGEMENT](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/d8/Cartesian-WAD-Logo-fp-d89e39a2.png)
![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/76/CWAA-Wealth-Management-7688780c.png)
##  Wealth Management
* ![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/4b/Arrow-Text-4b95af00.png)
**Clarity of Thought** : Just as Descartes sought clarity in philosophy we bring clarity to your financial journey.
Our transparent communication ensures you understand every step we take as we seek elegant solutions to your strategies.
* ![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/4b/Arrow-Text-4b95af00.png)
**Tailored Solutions** : One size doesn’t fit all. Your goals are unique – so are our strategies. We craft custom solutions that resonate with your aspirations, whether you’re building wealth, planning for retirement, or preserving your legacy.
* ![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/4b/Arrow-Text-4b95af00.png)
**Personalised Service & Dedicated Advisors**: Say goodbye to chatbots and call centres. Our dedicated wealth managers become your trusted partners – by your side throughout your financial journey, understanding your dreams, fears and aspirations.
* ![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/4b/Arrow-Text-4b95af00.png)
**Prosperity Through Planning** : Descartes’ maxim —“I think, therefore I am” — becomes our mantra: “I plan, therefore I prosper.” Let us guide you toward financial prosperity through meticulous planning and strategic execution.
Financial growth is nurtured with the same care and precision found in nature’s most beautiful creations. Experience the harmony of science and art in wealth management with Cartesian.
* [![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/li.png)](https://www.linkedin.com/company/cartesian-capital/)
* [![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/map.png)](https://maps.app.goo.gl/x89JxJVCiuPLoSCS8)
* [![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/telephone.png)](tel:+27113419929)
* [![](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/twitter.png)](https://x.com/CartesianCap)
![Cartesian WEALTH MANAGEMENT](https://cartesian.co.za/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/00/Cartesian-WAD-Logo-fp-000d4797.png)
Cartesian Capital is an Authorised Financial Services Provider I FSP Licence 45318
Cartesian Wealth and Advisory is a juristic representative of Cartesian Capital FSP Licence 45318
Beware of Impersonation Scams
We have been made aware of fraudulent Telegram groups and social media accounts impersonating financial institutions.
We do not operate any Telegram or WhatsApp groups or offer investment advice via social media platforms.
Official communication will always come directly from our verified channels. Please direct all queries to info@cartesian.co.za
**ACKNOWLEDGE**

tavily.answer:
Cartesian Capital Group's official website is https://www.cartesiangroup.com. It is a private investment management firm focused on growth capital for closely held companies. Cartesian Capital Group manages over $1.6 billion in pooled investment vehicles.
Cartesian Capital is a private equity firm founded in 2006, managing over $3 billion in funds, with offices in New York.
Cartesian Capital Group is a venture capital and private equity firm managing over $3 billion in funds, with offices in New York. Crunchbase does not list Cartesian Capital's profile. Cartesian Capital focuses on growing businesses through equity investments.
Cartesian Capital Group is a venture capital firm focused on high-growth startups, investing in sectors like technology and healthcare. It operates globally with offices in major financial hubs. Cartesian Capital Group is known for its rigorous investment process and advisory services.
Cartesian Capital Group is a global private equity firm founded in 2006 by Peter Yu, focusing on investing in and scaling promising businesses. It manages over $3 billion in funds and operates from New York City.
